The Clock Config in Figure 142 is 384 kRows/sec × 16 columns = 6.144 Mbps.
The audio streams in the Transport Pattern are:
• Manager: 2 channels of 48 kHz × 16-bit PCM.
• Peripheral 3: 2 channels of 48 kHz × 16-bit PCM.
• Peripheral 4: 2 channels of 48 kHz × 16-bit PCM.
The SSP Rate in this example is 48 kHz because the pattern repeats every 8 Rows.
